completedWork: LED Forward Voltage & Current Analysis Calculator - NEW: Comprehensive LED characteristics analysis tool. Features: LED color selection with typical Vf ranges (Red: 1.8-2.2V, Green: 2.0-3.0V, Blue: 3.0-3.4V, White: 3.0-3.4V, Yellow: 2.0-2.4V, Amber: 2.0-2.4V, IR: 1.2-1.8V, UV: 3.0-4.0V), forward voltage and current adjustment, configuration types (single, series, parallel LEDs), multiple LED support (2-10 LEDs), supply voltage input (1-48V). Real-time calculations: Required resistor value, resistor power dissipation, LED power, total power, efficiency percentage. Visual feedback: Interactive V-I characteristic curve with operating point marker, LED brightness preview with color matching and glow effect, real-time gauge displays, color-coded efficiency zones. Educational content: Forward voltage explanation, forward current characteristics, V-I curve behavior, series vs parallel configurations, efficiency calculations, LED datasheet parameters. Quick presets: Red LED 5V, Blue LEDs 12V series, RGB 5V parallel, White LEDs 24V series.

Solar Cell I-V Characteristic Simulation - NEW: Interactive photovoltaic cell behavior simulator. Features: Solar cell type selection (Monocrystalline Silicon: 22% eff, Polycrystalline Silicon: 17% eff, Thin Film CdTe: 18% eff) with cell-specific parameters, environmental controls (irradiance 100-1000 W/m², temperature -20°C to 80°C), operating voltage adjustment (0-Voc range). Real-time calculations using single-diode model: Short-circuit current (Isc) with irradiance and temp correction, Open-circuit voltage (Voc) with temperature coefficient, Maximum power point (Vmp, Imp), Fill Factor (FF = Pmax / (Voc × Isc)), Efficiency, Temperature coefficient effects. Visual feedback: Interactive I-V characteristic curve showing current vs voltage relationship, P-V power curve with MPP indicator, MPP and operating point markers, load line visualization, solar panel graphic. Educational content: I-V curve explanation (Isc, Voc, MPP points), P-V curve characteristics, environmental effects (irradiance ∝ Isc, temperature ↓ Voc), Fill Factor quality metric, MPPT tracking importance, applications (off-grid, grid-tied, water pumping). Quick scenarios: STC (1000 W/m², 25°C), Hot Summer Day (900 W/m², 45°C), Winter Morning (600 W/m², 10°C), Cloudy Day (300 W/m², 20°C), Desert High Temp (1000 W/m², 65°C).
